sections.paragraph:
δεσμέω (Aristot., De Plant. 1, 2 p. 817b, 21; Heliod. 8, 9; Jos., Bell. 1, 71 al.) Lk 8:29 v.l. for δεσμεύω, q.v.

Aristot Aristot , various works, IV b.c.—List 5

Heliod Heliod , III? a.d.—List 5

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

  1. al. =alibi (elsewhere), aliter (otherwise), alii (others)

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

q.v. q.v. = quod vide (which see, see that which has just been mentioned)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 219
